articles.title: No sign of larger hantavirus outbreak, says UN health agency
articles.summary: The situation could still change and there might be more confirmed cases, warns the head of the World Health Organization.

articles.title: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support'
articles.summary: The US president criticises an Iranian counteroffer to end the war, and says the month-long ceasefire is "unbelievably weak".

articles.title: Lebanon says two paramedics among 10 killed in Israeli strikes
articles.summary: Lebanon's health ministry says the paramedics were carrying out a rescue mission in Nabatieh in response to an earlier attack that killed one person.

articles.title: Zelensky's ex-chief of staff in court as Ukraine corruption probe escalates
articles.summary: Andriy Yermak was named by Ukraine's two anti-corruption agencies as a suspect in a money-laundering scheme.

articles.title: US inflation jumps to 3.8% as energy costs surge from Iran war
articles.summary: The key measure of US inflation rises its highest level since May 2023 as consumers feel the impact of the Iran war.

articles.title: South Africa's top court bars repeat asylum applications
articles.summary: The home affairs minister hails the ruling as a "victory" against the "abuse" of the refugee system.

articles.title: Hamas 'weaponised' sexual violence in 7 October attacks, Israeli investigation says
articles.summary: The most comprehensive report of its kind details harrowing cases of sexual attacks which it says were systematic.

articles.title: Dali ship operator charged over deadly Baltimore bridge collapse
articles.summary: Six construction workers were killed and several vehicles plunged into the river after the cargo ship crashed into the bridge.

articles.title: eBay rejects $55.5bn offer from GameStop
articles.summary: The online auction giant said it doubted how the video game retailer would finance its offer.

articles.title: Uganda's president sworn in for record seventh term
articles.summary: Yoweri Museveni, 81, won disputed elections in January to extend his 40-year rule.
